turns.q: My discount code isn't applying at checkout — what are the usual reasons?
turns.replyTail:
the code has expired
it is limited to certain products or collections
it needs a minimum spend
it only works once per customer or cannot be reused
it cannot be combined with another discount or automatic offer
the code was entered with a typo or extra space
